name: lib-adaptive-player
title: Adaptive Player
description: `<AdaptivePlayer>` — drop-in replacement for Remotion's `<Player>` that renders at the resolution it's actually displayed at (display CSS size × DPR, floored at 720px on the long edge, capped at intrinsic). Fixes the soft / pixelated look when a Player runs in a small or flexible container. Also exports `useAdaptiveCompositionSize(ref, w, h)` for callers managing their own Player ref.
